children.heading: Administration by Secretary of Agriculture
children.label: a Administration by Secretary of Agriculture
children.text: The program provided for under shall be administered by the Secretary of Agriculture through the National Institute of Food and Agriculture, in consultation with the Food and Nutrition Service and the Human Nutrition Information Service. The Secretary shall ensure that the National Institute of Food and Agriculture coordinates activities carried out under this subtitle with the ongoing food, nutrition, and consumer education activities of other agencies of the Department of Agriculture.section 3175c of this title

children.heading: Evaluation and report
children.label: b Evaluation and report
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture, not later than , shall submit to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report evaluating the effectiveness of the program provided for under .April 1, 1989section 3175c of this title
